evals.prompt: what should I focus on today?
evals.expected_output: A prioritized Focus Brief: top 3 items with short reasons, biggest blocker, one deferral, and a clear next action. Should NOT be a plain list of all open tasks.

evals.prompt: I've only got 90 minutes before my Priya 1:1 — what should I do?
evals.expected_output: A time-boxed plan adapted to the 90-minute window. Should connect tasks to the upcoming meeting, name what to skip, and flag risk if something is left undone. Should not give a generic task list.

evals.prompt: what's at risk if I stop working at 4 today?
evals.expected_output: Identifies 1-3 at-risk commitments, distinguishes real risk from nice-to-have work, and suggests 1-2 mitigation steps. Should not treat all unfinished work as equally risky.
Surfaces stale or high-consequence items; separates waiting-on-others from you-owe; recommends who to nudge and why now. Should not just repeat the Waiting On section.

evals.prompt: who do I need to nudge this week?
evals.expected_output: Identifies the 1-3 people most worth nudging, explains why each matters now, and optionally drafts short nudge messages. Should not name everyone with an open waiting item.

evals.prompt: what do I owe people right now?
evals.expected_output: Focuses on interpersonal promises, deliverables owed to others, and decisions that unblock people. Each item should have a recommended action (send / decide / close). Should not give a generic task dump.

A concise Meeting Brief: objective, 1-3 context bullets, open loops, decisions/asks, and talking points. Should feel decision-oriented, not like a context dump. Should not exceed what fits in a natural pre-meeting read.

evals.prompt: what should I bring to my next Priya 1:1?
evals.expected_output: A 1:1 Brief personalized to Priya: what matters most, updates, open questions, asks/decisions, and a recommended agenda. Should use context from tasks, prior meetings, or waiting items tied to Priya.

evals.prompt: give me talking points for my manager sync
evals.expected_output: 3-5 concise, high-signal bullets covering progress, blockers, asks, and any risks worth flagging. Should feel meeting-ready and emphasis asks or decisions, not be a status dump.

evals.prompt: I'm juggling too many threads right now. Help me decide what matters.
evals.expected_output: A Triage Brief: do-first, do-second, stop-worrying-about, one person to update, one stabilizing next step. Should feel calming and decisive. Should not mirror the stress or give more options instead of fewer.
